title: Prism Object
description: Output of Phase A (VN Formation Protocol). Captures the inventor's unique pattern of understanding through three discovery stages: Seed (Genesis), Polaric Mapping (Dyad), and Emergence (Triad).
$comment: Validation gate: inventor_confirmation must be true AND irreducibility_confidence > 0.7 AND crystallization_confidence > 0.6. If any condition fails, Phase A re-engages — does NOT pass to Phase B.

seed_element.description: Irreducible core of the invention — the element that cannot be simplified further without losing the invention's identity. Output of Stage 1 (Genesis).

irreducibility_confidence.description: Confidence (0–1) that the seed_element cannot be further reduced. Must exceed 0.7 for Phase B entry.

projection.description: Structured description of the novel contribution (+36° strand). Output of Stage 2 (Dyad).

summary.description: High-level summary of the invention's novel contribution.

elements.description: Specific novel elements identified during polaric mapping.

reflection.description: Structured description of the prior art state (−36° strand). Output of Stage 2 (Dyad).

summary.description: High-level summary of the current state of the art.

prior_art_refs.description: Specific prior art references (patents, papers, products).

tension_points.description: Specific divergences between the invention and prior art. Each point has a description and severity score.

severity.description: Severity of the divergence (0 = minor, 1 = fundamental).

emergent_claims.description: Novel claims crystallized from the interference pattern. Output of Stage 3 (Triad). At least one required.

crystallization_confidence.description: Confidence (0–1) that the emergent claims are genuinely novel. Must exceed 0.6 for Phase B entry.

inventor_confirmation.description: Inventor explicitly confirmed the prism accuracy. Must be true for Phase B entry.

session_transcript.description: Full session transcript for provenance tracking.

artifacts.description: Uploaded files, code, specifications, or diagrams provided during the session.

content.description: Text content or base64-encoded binary content.
